mapper.update: UPDATE user SET credits = credits - 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND credits > 0
UPDATE user SET credits = credits + 3, daily_ad_count = daily_ad_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND daily_ad_count < 5
UPDATE user SET credits = credits + 2, daily_share_count = daily_share_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND daily_share_count < 2

UPDATE user SET credits = 3, daily_ad_count = 0, daily_share_count = 0, last_reset_date = CURDATE(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND (last_reset_date IS NULL OR last_reset_date < CURDATE())
